titles.title: Homeopathic Drug Product Safety, Quality, and Transparency Act
Homeopathic Drug Product Safety, Quality, and Transparency Act
A bill to amend the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act with respect to homeopathic drug products, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
